subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the Most Exalted Station and circumambulator of the Sacred Shrine of the Most Glorious One! Praise be to God, thou hast exerted a commendable effort and traversed the wilderness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مقام اعلی و طائف مطاف ملا ابهی الحمد لله سعی مشکور نمودی و بادیه و
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @law of pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
